name: Vinsmoke Niji (OP06-065) (Jolly Roger Foil)
effect_text: [On Play] If the number of DON!! cards on your field is equal to or less than the number on your opponent's field, choose one:• K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 2 or less.• Return up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 4 or less to the owner's hand.
